external_services.service_name: Crop Production Assistance – Provision of Technical Assistance for Crop Production
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Crop Production Assistance – Provision of Technical Assistance for Crop Production
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government

steps.client_step: 1. Submit request letter to Lipa City Agriculture Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive request letter and endorse to the Agricultural Extension Worker; 1.2.a. Validate and approve request by conducting table interview; 1.2.b. Validate and approve request by conducting actual site validation
steps.processing_time: Regular: 8 mins; New: 1 day and 3 mins
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Agriculturist, Agriculturist I, Agriculturist II, Asst. City Agriculturist, City Agriculturist

steps.client_step: 2. Be present at the conduct of the activity
steps.agency_action: 2. Provide technical assistance from land preparation to harvesting and marketing
steps.person_responsible: Agriculturist I, Agriculturist II, Farm Worker II (Lipa City Agriculture Office)

total.processing_time: Regular: 1 day and 8 minutes; New: 2 days and 3 minutes

external_services.service_name: Crop Production Assistance - Request for Inputs for Gardening
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Crop Production Assistance - Request for Inputs for Gardening
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizen, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government
external_services.who_may_avail: All farmers and any interested individuals

steps.client_step: 1. Submit letter of request to the Lipa City Agriculture Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive request letter and endorse; 1.2.a/b. Validate and approve request (table interview or site validation); 1.3. Approve request and provide recommendation
steps.processing_time: Regular: 18 mins; New: 1 day and 13 mins
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Agriculturist, Agriculturist I, Agriculturist II, Asst. City Agriculturist, City Agriculturist

steps.client_step: 2. Claim the inputs
steps.agency_action: 2. Distribute inputs (provide seeds, seedlings, fertilizers, tools, etc.)
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV, Agriculturist I, Agriculturist II (Lipa City Agriculture Office)

total.processing_time: Regular: 48 minutes; New: 1 day and 43 minutes

external_services.service_name: Farmers and Fisher folks Registry Assistance (RSBSA, PCA, PCIC, etc)
external_services.who_may_avail: Farmers, fisher folks and interested individuals

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Government issued ID (with birthday and Lipa City address) – 1 photocopy

steps.client_step: 1. Submit accomplished registration form
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive, review and conduct interview; 1.2. Encode into the system; 1.3. Endorse to APCO, PCA, PCIC, etc.; 1.4. Verify entries at the registry system
steps.person_responsible: Agriculturist I, Agriculturist II, Supervising Agriculturist (Lipa City Agriculture Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit request letter
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive request letter and conduct interview; 1.2. Approve the request; 1.3. Schedule the activity
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Agriculturist, Assistant City Agriculturist, City Agriculturist, Agriculturist I, Agriculturist II

steps.client_step: 2. Be present at the conduct of immersion
steps.agency_action: 2. Conduct actual immersion activity
steps.person_responsible: Agriculturist I, Agriculturist II (Lipa City Agriculture Office)

external_services.service_name: Issuance of Certification for Unproductive Fruit Trees (for cutting of trees)
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Issuance of Certification for Unproductive Fruit Trees
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Land title – 1 photocopy; Photos of fruit trees for cutting – 1 original copy; Vicinity map – 1 photocopy; Barangay certification – 1 original copy

steps.client_step: 1. Submit request letter and its attachments to the Lipa City Agriculture Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive, check completeness and endorse; 1.2. Conduct site visitation and give recommendation
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Agriculturist, Agriculturist I, Agriculturist II (Lipa City Agriculture Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Claim the certification
steps.agency_action: 2. Process documents and issue certification
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Agriculturist, Asst. City Agriculturist, City Agriculturist (Lipa City Agriculture Office)

external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Businesses, G2G – Government to Government

steps.client_step: 1. Submit request letter to the Lipa City Agriculture Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1 Receive and record; 1.2.a/b. Validate and approve request (table interview or site validation); 1.3 Schedule the land preparation activity
steps.processing_time: Old: 13 mins; New: 1 day and 8 mins
steps.person_responsible: Engineer II (Agricultural and Biosystems Engineer) (Lipa City Agriculture Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Be present at the site during land preparation activity
steps.agency_action: 2. Deploy personnel/ conduct of tractor operation for land preparation
steps.person_responsible: Farm Worker II (Lipa City Agriculture Office)

total.processing_time: Old: 1 day and 13 minutes; New: 2 days and 8 minutes

external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government

steps.client_step: 1. Submit request letter to the Lipa City Agriculture Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive and endorse; 1.2. Collect samples; 1.3. Recommend and apply initial management; 1.4. Endorse to DA-RCPC; 1.5. Laboratory testing; 1.6. Claim results
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Agriculturist, Agriculturist I, Agriculturist II, DA - Regional Crop Protection Center

steps.client_step: 2. Claim the result of laboratory analysis
steps.agency_action: 2. Release and explain the result to the requesting party
steps.person_responsible: Agriculturist I, Agriculturist II (Lipa City Agriculture Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Prepare materials and area for recommended management
steps.agency_action: 3. Assist farmer to perform recommended management control
steps.person_responsible: Agriculturist I, Agriculturist II (Lipa City Agriculture Office)

external_services.service_name: Provision of Fruit Bearing and Forest Trees Seedlings for Tree Planting Activities
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Provision of Fruit Bearing and Forest Trees Seedlings for Tree Planting Activities
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government

steps.client_step: 1. Submit request letter to the Lipa City Agriculture Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive and conduct interview; 1.2. Schedule pick-up of seedlings
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Agriculturist, Administrative Aide IV

steps.client_step: 2. Claim the seedlings
steps.agency_action: 2. Release the seedlings
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI (Crops Division, Lipa City Agriculture Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit request letter to Lipa City Agriculture Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive and endorse; 1.2. Collect samples; 1.3. Endorse to Regional Soil Laboratory; 1.4. Actual testing; 1.5. Claim result
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Agriculturist, Agriculturist I, Agriculturist II, DA-Regional Soils Laboratory

steps.client_step: 2. Claim the result of laboratory analysis
steps.agency_action: 2. Release and explain the result to the requesting party
steps.person_responsible: Agriculturist I, Agriculturist II (Lipa City Agriculture Office)

external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business, G2G – Government to Government

steps.client_step: 1. Submit report to Lipa City Agriculture Office
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive report and inform AEW; 1.2. Monitor existing dispersal project; 1.3. Prepare and submit recommendation/ monitoring report
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Agriculturist, Agriculturist I (Lipa City Agriculture Office)

steps.person_responsible: Supervising Agriculturist, Agriculturist I, Agriculturist II, Asst. City Agriculturist, City Agriculturist
